heading: TTY installation by Congress
label: 18104 TTY installation by Congress
text: Each House of Congress shall establish a policy under which Members of the House of Representatives and the Senate may obtain TTY’s for use in communicating with hearing-impaired and speech-impaired individuals, and for the use of hearing-impaired and speech-impaired employees.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1810440:762d., , .Pub. L. 100–542, § 6102 Stat. 2722Oct. 28, 1988The words “As soon as practicable” and “as the case may be” are omitted as unnecessary.
